title: Olympics: Bag containing cash stolen from Indonesian team in Paris - ANTARA News
author: antaranews.com
description: The Indonesian badminton team lost a bag containing 53 thousand euros, a credit card, and a passport in Paris at 5:30 p.m. local time on Monday, according ...
